metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2197
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.4: "Myo5a mediates the postendocytic recycling of TrkB-FL but not TrkB.T1" [shRNA, overexpression]
Fig.7: "Inhibiting the association between Myo5a and TrkB by TAT-5aExonE55-66 reduces the recycling of TrkB-FL" [TAT peptide of Myo5a domain --> overexopression]
Fig.8: "Myo5a mediates the postendocytic recycling of TrkB-FL and contributes to the BDNF-triggered translocation of TrkB-FL into dendritic spines and sustained downstream signaling" [TAT peptide of Myo5a domain --> overexpression]. Experimental description: Neuronal culture: species of the neuronal culture not stated in the paper.
Overexpressed proteins: "Plasmid constructs of rat TrkB-FL, TrkB.T1, TrkB mutant constructs, Myc-Rab11, HA-Rab3a were kept in our laboratory (Zhao et al., 2009; Huang et al., 2013)"
